methods.method_name: Add a new tag to a Case.
Add a new tag to a report.
Add a new tag to an Account.
Add a tag to a transaction, creating a new tag if it doesn't exist yet, without affecting transactions with existing tags.
Add a tag to an Inquiry.
Add Persona objects (such as inquiries, accounts, or reports) to a Case.
Approve an inquiry by triggering associated workflows and webhooks to prevent further progress.
Archive a Browser Fingerprint List Item to prevent matching against new inquiries.
Archive a Country List Item to prevent it from being matched against new inquiries.

Archive a Field List Item to prevent matching against new inquiries.

Archive an existing list, making it no longer match on inquiries while still retrievable.
Archive an IP Address List Item to prevent matching against new inquiries.
Assign a Case to a Persona user.
Authorize another Organization to access your resources such as Inquiries and Verifications by creating an Authorization.
Bulk import accounts by uploading a CSV file with details for new accounts like reference ID, names, birthdate, and tags.
Clone a Webhook by creating a copy with all attributes except the secret transferred to the new webhook.
Clone an API key by creating a duplicate with all attributes except the value copied over.
Consolidate multiple accounts into one destination account, transferring associated Persona resources. Ideal for cleaning up duplicate accounts.

Expire all active Inquiry Sessions for a given set of Inquiries.

Expire an Inquiry, cancel pending Verifications, and sessions. Inquiry can be resumed after expiry.
Generate a one-time link for a specific Inquiry Session.
Generate a one-time link for a specific inquiry, creating a new session and providing a unique one-time link for it.
Import a list of government ID numbers and details in bulk by uploading a CSV file, specifying ID number and class for each item.
Import a list of IP addresses by uploading a CSV file, supporting both IPv4 and IPv6, with details for each new list item.
Import a list of names by uploading a CSV file, with each row containing details for a new list item including first and last name columns.
Import email address lists in bulk by uploading a CSV file with details for new list items, including value and match type.
Import geolocation lists and bulk import list items by uploading a CSV file with latitude, longitude, and radius.
Import phone number lists by bulk uploading a CSV file with details for each new list item, including the value column.

Search for accounts using a flexible query language, allowing complex queries with boolean logic, custom fields, and multiple conditions simultaneously.
Search for cases using a flexible query language with boolean logic, custom fields, assignee, case queue, and more.
Set tags on a specific case, adding or updating all provided tags while removing any tags not included in the request.
Set tags on a specific report, adding or removing tags as specified in the request.
Set tags on a transaction by providing a list of tags to add or remove, ensuring only the specified tags are associated with the transaction.
